name: sofia_opportunity_decision_rules
description: Basic rules for deciding whether a content opportunity should become a webpage update, new page, blog post, social media post, monitoring item, or no action.

create_new_page.reason: A new SEO page may be needed.

update_existing_page.reason: This should update an existing URL, not create a new draft page.

create_blog_post.reason: A blog post can enter the content workflow.

create_social_post.reason: Social content should enter a separate social workflow, not the webpage draft workflow.

review_existing_content.reason: Existing page or draft should be reviewed before creating anything new.

monitor_only.reason: Store or observe the opportunity, but do not publish yet.

no_action.reason: No content action should be taken.

rules.name: Unsafe or unsuitable topic
rules.condition: Topic is inappropriate for professional, legal, ethical, brand, or safety reasons.
rules.reason: The idea should not be developed as public content.

rules.name: Exact duplicate already in draft registry
rules.condition: Target keyword matches an existing draft in the same workspace.
rules.reason: The idea is already in Sofia's draft pipeline.

rules.name: Exact slug already exists
rules.condition: Suggested slug matches an existing slug in site_structure.json.
rules.reason: The page already exists and should not be recreated.

rules.name: Exact keyword already exists in workspace memory
rules.condition: Target keyword matches keyword_index or draft_content in site_content_memory.json.
rules.reason: The keyword is already covered or in progress.

rules.name: Commercial or service topic missing
rules.condition: Search intent is service or commercial and no matching slug, keyword, or draft exists.
rules.reason: The topic may deserve a dedicated SEO page.

rules.name: Informational topic missing
rules.condition: Search intent is informational and no matching slug, keyword, or draft exists.
rules.reason: The topic is educational and may be better as a blog post.

rules.name: Useful but too small for webpage
rules.condition: Topic is useful, relevant, and short, but does not justify a full webpage or blog post.
rules.reason: The topic is better suited for social media than permanent website content.

rules.name: Source came from social media
rules.condition: Opportunity source is a social platform and no website update is required.
rules.reason: The opportunity came from social media and may be best answered on the same or preferred local platform.

rules.name: Timely local market item
rules.condition: Topic is locally relevant and timely, but not evergreen enough for a webpage.
rules.reason: The content is locally relevant but better suited to short-form communication.

rules.name: Potential future opportunity
rules.condition: Topic may become useful later but is not strong enough for publication now.
rules.reason: The opportunity should be kept under observation but not published yet.

rules.name: Existing webpage sufficient but social reminder useful
rules.condition: Relevant webpage already exists, no page update is needed, but the topic can be promoted socially.
rules.reason: No website change is needed, but the existing content can be reused or promoted on social media.
